title: lasianthus ferrugineus
intro: Lasianthus ferrugineus, also known as the rusty lasianthus, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Lasianthus ferrugineus include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, Lasianthus ferrugineus is often made into a tea or decoction, and can also be used in the form of a tincture or extract to harness its medicinal properties.
